points.text: Ecolab Life Sciences opened a Bioprocessing Applications Lab in Dongtan, Korea, to support downstream process development for biosimilars and monoclonal antibody processes across Asia.

Syndax Pharmaceuticals reported Q1 2026 total revenue of $64.9 million, a 224% year-over-year increase, driven by its FDA-approved monoclonal antibody Niktimvo (axatilimab-csfr) targeting the CSF-1 receptor.
Cue Biopharma secured $30 million in gross proceeds via a private placement to advance its clinical pipeline, including the acquisition of Ascendant-221, a dual-mechanism anti-IgE antibody.

Pliant Therapeutics — PLN-101095 — ICI-refractory solid tumors — Phase 1b FORTIFY trial initiated with first patient dosed; updated Phase 1 data showed 89% average tumor reduction and 19-month median time on treatment in responders.

AstraZeneca received US FDA approval for Saphnelo (anifrolumab), a monoclonal antibody targeting type I interferon receptor, as a subcutaneous autoinjector formulation for systemic lupus erythematosus.

Gastroesophageal adenocarcinoma (GEA) treatment landscape now includes durvalumab, a monoclonal antibody targeting PD-L1, combined with FLOT chemotherapy to improve survival rates over chemotherapy alone.
BeOne Medicines received US FDA priority review for sBLA of Tevimbra (toripalimab), a PD-1 monoclonal antibody, for first-line HER2+ gastroesophageal adenocarcinoma.
Pfizer announced positive Phase 3 MagnetisMM-5 results for Elrexfio (elranatamab), a BCMA-targeting bispecific monoclonal antibody, as monotherapy in relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma.

Ecolab Life Sciences — Bioprocessing Applications Lab (BPAL) — Downstream process development for monoclonal antibodies — Launched first Asia facility in Dongtan, Korea to optimize chromatography and purification for regional biosimilar and mAb pipelines.

Syndax Pharmaceuticals — Niktimvo (axatilimab-csfr) — Relapsed/refractory Castleman disease — FDA-approved monoclonal antibody blocking CSF-1 receptor; contributed to Q1 2026 revenue growth alongside Revuforj.
Cue Biopharma — Ascendant-221 — Autoimmune and inflammatory diseases — Exclusive license acquired for clinical-stage dual-mechanism anti-IgE antibody; $30M PIPE financing allocated for development.

Pliant Therapeutics — PLN-101095 — ICI-refractory solid tumors — Phase 1b FORTIFY trial expansion enrolling; Phase 1 data presented at AACR 2026 showed 1 complete response, 2 partial responses, and 1 unconfirmed partial response in cholangiocarcinoma, NSCLC, melanoma, and HNSCC.
AstraZeneca — Saphnelo (anifrolumab) — Systemic Lupus Erythematosus — FDA approved new subcutaneous autoinjector formulation for self-administration.
AstraZeneca — Durvalumab — Gastroesophageal Adenocarcinoma — Monoclonal antibody combined with FLOT chemotherapy demonstrated improved survival rates in clinical practice.
BeOne Medicines — Tevimbra (toripalimab) — First-line HER2+ GEA — US FDA granted priority review for sBLA submission; PD-1 monoclonal antibody.
Pfizer — Elrexfio (elranatamab) — Relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma — Phase 3 MagnetisMM-5 study met primary endpoint as monotherapy; BCMA-targeting bispecific monoclonal antibody.

Ecolab Life Sciences — Expansion of bioprocessing network for monoclonal antibody manufacturing — BPAL Korea facility — First Asia site established to support resin screening and purification for growing regional mAb and biosimilar pipelines.

Syndax Pharmaceuticals — Commercial-stage oncology expansion — Niktimvo (axatilimab-csfr) monoclonal antibody + Revuforj pipeline — Q1 2026 revenue $64.9M (+224% YoY); advancing multiple clinical trials.
Cue Biopharma — Clinical-stage biologic development — Ascendant-221 (anti-IgE antibody) + internal pipeline — $30M private placement closed April 2026; funds designated for clinical advancement.

Pliant Therapeutics — Advancing TGF-β inhibitor PLN-101095 in combination with pembrolizumab — PLN-101095 — Phase 1b FORTIFY trial ongoing; biomarker data showed 4- to 13-fold IFN-γ increase in responders correlating with PD-L1 elevation.
AstraZeneca — Expansion of monoclonal antibody delivery options — Saphnelo (anifrolumab) — US FDA approval secured for subcutaneous autoinjector in SLE.
AstraZeneca — Immunotherapy integration in GEA — Durvalumab (anti-PD-L1 mAb) — Standard of care component in FLOT combination regimens for gastroesophageal adenocarcinoma.
BeOne Medicines — Regulatory expansion in oncology — Tevimbra (toripalimab) — PD-1 monoclonal antibody; sBLA under priority review for first-line HER2+ GEA indication.
Pfizer — Commercialization of bispecific antibodies — Elrexfio (elranatamab) — BCMA-targeting monoclonal antibody; Phase 3 MagnetisMM-5 positive results as monotherapy in RRMM.

Niktimvo (axatilimab-csfr) — Mechanism: Monoclonal antibody blocking CSF-1 receptor — Phase: Commercial — Population: Relapsed/refractory Castleman disease — Comparator: N/A (approved therapy) — Status: FDA-approved; key revenue driver in Q1 2026.

Ascendant-221 — Mechanism: Dual-mechanism anti-IgE antibody — Phase: Clinical — Population: Autoimmune and inflammatory diseases — Comparator: N/A — Status: Licensed by Cue Biopharma; development funded by $30M PIPE.

PLN-101095 — Mechanism: TGF-β receptor inhibitor (non-antibody small molecule) — Phase: 1b (FORTIFY) — Population: ICI-refractory advanced/metastatic solid tumors — Comparator: None (monotherapy run-in + combo) — Endpoints/Results: 89% average tumor reduction, 19-month median time on treatment in responders; IFN-γ and PD-L1 elevation observed.

Anifrolumab — Mechanism: Type I interferon receptor antagonist (monoclonal antibody) — Phase: Approved — Population: Systemic Lupus Erythematosus — Comparator: Intravenous formulation — Endpoint: Subcutaneous autoinjector approval for self-administration.

Durvalumab — Mechanism: PD-L1 blocking monoclonal antibody — Phase: Approved/Standard of Care — Population: Gastroesophageal Adenocarcinoma — Comparator: Chemotherapy alone — Endpoint: Improved survival rates when added to FLOT regimen.

Tevimbra (toripalimab) — Mechanism: PD-1 checkpoint inhibition (monoclonal antibody) — Phase: sBLA review — Population: First-line HER2+ gastroesophageal adenocarcinoma — Status: Priority review granted by US FDA.

Elrexfio (elranatamab) — Mechanism: BCMA-targeting bispecific monoclonal antibody — Phase: 3 (MagnetisMM-5) — Population: Adults with relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma — Comparator: Monotherapy regimen — Outcome: Positive results announced.

Ecolab Life Sciences — Strategic expansion of bioprocessing capabilities — Monoclonal antibody downstream support — Opened new BPAL in Korea to serve Asia-Pacific manufacturers developing biosimilars and mAbs.

Cue Biopharma — Secured $30 million gross proceeds via private placement (PIPE) — Ascendant-221 license + general corporate purposes — Pre-funded warrants sold at $11.00 effective price; closing expected May 4, 2026.
Syndax Pharmaceuticals — Q1 2026 financial performance — Niktimvo (monoclonal antibody) + Revuforj — Total revenue $64.9M (+224% YoY); Revuforj net revenue $48.9M.
